title: symphoricarpos albus var. laevigatus
intro: Symphoricarpos albus var. laevigatus, also known as the silver coralberry, is a deciduous shrub native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of silver coralberry include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, as well as exhibiting potential antiviral and antifungal activities. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
